arts.ttl: Burnley v Swansea City: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets look to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: After facing four away games in five, Burnley are back on familiar ground this weekend when they welcome Swansea City to Turf Moor.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker on Burnley's Swansea City test, injury news and 'strange' fixture schedule
arts.sum: Burnley will have precious time to prepare for this afternoon’s return to Turf Moor as Scott Parker’s men take on Swansea City.

arts.ttl: Swansea City's Lawrence Vigouroux gives comical reason why he doesn't expect to be booed on Burnley return
arts.sum: Lawrence Vigouroux has quipped he doesn’t expect to receive any boos on his return to Turf Moor as Burnley fans probably won’t recognise him.

arts.ttl: Burnley vs Swansea predictions: Defences can dominate for goal-shy sides
arts.sum: Phil Agius expects goals to be at a premium when Burnley and Swansea meet in the Championship on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Swansea City team news: 13 to miss out through injury and one fitness doubt - gallery
arts.sum: Burnley are in action on a Sunday for the second weekend running as they welcome Swansea City to Turf Moor this weekend.

arts.ttl: Burnley predicted team to face Swansea City as midfielder's push to reclaim their spot - gallery
arts.sum: It’s a quick turnaround for Burnley as they return to Turf Moor on Sunday to face Swansea City.

arts.ttl: 18 of the best fan pictures from Burnley's goalless draw against West Brom at The Hawthorns
arts.sum: Burnley were in fine voice at The Hawthorns on Thursday night as Scott Parker’s men played out another goalless draw – this time against West Brom.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker on 'brilliant' CJ Egan-Riley, Burnley’s imperious defence and change in ‘structure’
arts.sum: Scott Parker lavished CJ Egan-Riley with praise after the defender continued his fine form with another rock-solid display against West Brom.
